   ![A screenshot of the Print & Sign Download Document Download dialog box to download a document.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/sign-p-s-download-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0NTQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.KoJs9tGoXu5paSBDs_-LpjFLhu995wTKIpYkrdEGnPU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Print & Sign Download Document Download dialog box to download a document.")
2. Print the documents that you saved.
3. Complete and sign the printed pages.
4. Scan the signed documents and save them as a file on your computer.
5. In the Print &Sign Download Document dialog
   box, select RETURN DOCUMENT.

   ![A screenshot of the Print & Sign Document Return Document dialog box to return a document.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/sign-p-s-return-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0NTQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.KoJs9tGoXu5paSBDs_-LpjFLhu995wTKIpYkrdEGnPU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Print & Sign Document Return Document dialog box to return a document.")
6. Select UPLOAD A FILE.

   ![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/sign-p-s-upload-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0NTQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.KoJs9tGoXu5paSBDs_-LpjFLhu995wTKIpYkrdEGnPU&_LANG=enus)
7. Select the signed documents to upload the document.

   - Drag the signed documents to the dialog box.
   - Select UPLOAD A FILE, and choose the signed
     documents.
8. Select FINISH to send the document.

   ![A screenshot of the Print & Sign Document Finish dialog box to complete uploading a document.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/sign-p-s-finish-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0NTQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.KoJs9tGoXu5paSBDs_-LpjFLhu995wTKIpYkrdEGnPU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Print & Sign Document Finish dialog box to complete uploading a document.")

   The final document includes the original document and the
   uploaded, signed files.

   Tip:

   To avoid unnecessary document duplication, only return the
   relevant signature pages.

title: Adopt Your Signature
text:
Learn how to choose a style for your signature and initial when you first sign a document with Docusign.

The first time you select a Sign or Initial field on a document, you're asked to adopt a style for your signature or initials.

Note: To learn how to adopt and manage your signature and initials from within your Docusign account, see the [Create Your Signature](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=jux1643235969954&topicId=lvo1578456442907.html&_LANG=enus) article.

When you adopt your signature, you can:

- Use a predefined style from Docusign
- Draw your signature or initials
- Upload an image

You adopt your signature and initials separately when you select the corresponding field. For example, you can choose to upload your signature when you select a Sign field and draw your initials when you select the Initials field. Keep in mind that the sender can disable the options to draw or upload your signature and initials.

To adopt a predefined style from Docusign:

1. Verify that your Full Name and Initials are correct after you select a Sign or Initial field on a document.

   Your name and initials display in the default Docusign signature style.

   ![Screenshot of the Full name and Initials fields in the Adopt Your Signature dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signingadopt1.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzODQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.4namKREUoIRhuyi-w9zN873Hjpr9Y9ZIsrrs3hRZVSQ&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of the Full name and Initials fields in the Adopt Your Signature dialog box.")
2. (Optional) Select a different predefined style by selecting Change Style.

   ![Screenshot showing the Change Style option at the top right, just above your signature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signingadopt2.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzODQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.4namKREUoIRhuyi-w9zN873Hjpr9Y9ZIsrrs3hRZVSQ&_LANG=enus "Screenshot showing the Change Style option at the top right, just above your signature.")
3. (Optional) Scroll through the signature styles in the panel on the right and select the one you like.

   ![Screenshot showing the list of signature styles you can choose in the Adopt Your Signature dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signingadopt3.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzODQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.4namKREUoIRhuyi-w9zN873Hjpr9Y9ZIsrrs3hRZVSQ&_LANG=enus "Screenshot showing the list of signature styles you can choose in the Adopt Your Signature dialog box.")

   When you select a style, the style applies in the preview and the list closes.
4. After you're finished, make sure that your signature or initials are correct, and select ADOPT AND SIGN.
5. You're asked if you want to create a free Docusign account and save a copy of the document to it.

   Create a free Docusign account to:

   - Use the signature and initials you adopted in this document for additional documents. Otherwise, you must create and adopt a signature each time you sign.
   - Manage your signature and documents.

title: Adopt Your Signature
text:
If you don't see any predefined signature styles that appeal to you, you can draw your signature and initials. Drawing your signature and initials freehand works best if you have a stylus. However, if you have a touchscreen device, you can also use your mouse pointer or even your finger.

Tip: You can use the Docusign mobile app on a tablet or other mobile device to draw your signature and initials. Use a stylus or just your finger to capture your own unique style.

1. In the window that opens when you first select a Sign or Initial field on a document, select the DRAW tab.

   Note: If you don’t see the DRAW and UPLOAD options, the sender might have disabled them.
2. (Optional) In the DRAW YOUR SIGNATURE or DRAW YOUR INITIALS field, use a mouse or, for touchscreens, your finger or a stylus to draw your signature or initials. The following image shows how to draw your signature after selecting a Sign field.

   If you make a mistake, select Clear in the upper-right corner just above your signature to reset the field.

   ![Screenshot of the Draw a Signature field and controls in the Adopt Your Signature dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signingadopt4.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzODQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.4namKREUoIRhuyi-w9zN873Hjpr9Y9ZIsrrs3hRZVSQ&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of the Draw a Signature field and controls in the Adopt Your Signature dialog box.")

title: Adopt Your Signature
heading_path: Upload an Image of Your Signature or Initials
text:
You can also upload images of your signature and initials instead of using a predefined style. The image files should meet these requirements:

- Maximum file size: 3MB
- File formats: GIF, JPG, PNG, and BMP
- For the best results, use an image that is 400 x 150 pixels in size

1. In the window that opens when you first select a Sign or Initial field on a document, select the UPLOAD tab.

   Note: If you don’t see the DRAW and UPLOAD options, the sender might have disabled them.
2. Select UPLOAD YOUR SIGNATURE or UPLOAD YOUR INITIALS and browse to the location of the image file on your device.

   ![Screenshot of uploading your signature in the Adopt Your Signature window.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signingadopt5.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzODQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.4namKREUoIRhuyi-w9zN873Hjpr9Y9ZIsrrs3hRZVSQ&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of uploading your signature in the Adopt Your Signature window.")
3. If you upload or select a different signature, you can resize the signature using resizing controls.

   ![Screenshot of signature crop controls.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signcropsig.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzODQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.4namKREUoIRhuyi-w9zN873Hjpr9Y9ZIsrrs3hRZVSQ&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of signature crop controls.")

   1
   :   Drag the small white squares on the bottom and right side of the signature rectangle to resize the signature.

   2
   :   Use the slider to increase or decrease the signature size.

   3
   :   Click the image and move it within the rectangle.

   4
   :   Select Rotate to move the image 90 degrees for each click.

By creating an account, you can manage your signatures through your Docusign eSignature account, including:

- Adding signatures
- Changing the signatures you have adopted
- Drawing your signatures and initials

If you haven't already created a free Docusign account, create one and manage your signatures there. The next time you sign a document, Docusign will use the signature and initials you selected through your account.

For information on how to add, change, and manage your signatures through your Docusign account, see the [Create Your Signature](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=jux1643235969954&topicId=lvo1578456442907.html&_LANG=enus) article.

title: Sign With the Evrotrust Trust Service Provider to Issue Qualified Electronic Signatures in the European Union
heading_path: Sign With the Evrotrust Trust Service Provider to Issue Qualified Electronic Signatures in the European Union
text:
Learn how to use the Evrotrust Trust Service Provider (TSP) to digitally sign documents
with the same legal value as handwritten signatures.

title: Sign With the Evrotrust Trust Service Provider to Issue Qualified Electronic Signatures in the European Union
heading_path: Sign With the Evrotrust Trust Service Provider to Issue Qualified Electronic Signatures in the European Union
text:
Complete the following prerequisites before signing with
Evrotrust:

- Download the Evrotrust mobile application, as described in the [evrotrust](https://www.evrotrust.com/landing/en#download) page
- Register in the Evrotrust mobile application, as described in the [Evrotrust Registration
  Demo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZajQwY9pofY) video

Use the Evrotrust Trust Service Provider (TSP) to Issue Qualified Electronic Signatures (QES)
in the European Union when you sign a document.

You received a Docusign email prompting you to review and sign some
documents. The sender of the envelope requires that you use Evrotrust to sign your
documents.

1. Select REVIEW DOCUMENT in the Docusign email.

   The document to review displays.
2. Select CONTINUE.

   You can now access the envelope.
3. Apply your signature to all the required SIGN
   tags.
4. Select CONTINUE.

   The Evrotrust authentication dialog box displays.
5. Enter your Evrotrust identifier.
6. Select SEND.
7. Follow the instructions in the [Docusign eSignature: How to Sign a Document with Evrotrust](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Klmr97W72is) video.

Evrotrust processes your signature, and you receive a
notification that the signing is complete through an email message. You also receive an
Evrotrust mobile app notification.

Save a copy of the document by logging on to your
Docusign account.

For additional information, see the
list of Evrotrust supported countries on the [evrotrust list of countries](https://www.evrotrust.com/doc/eIDAS/Countries_en.html) page.

title: Use Docusign AI-Assisted Signing Features
text:
Docusign Signing AI Summary and extraction outlines the most important
information in agreement and displays the key agreement details. Use the Ask a question
feature for customized agreement details and associated citations.

Docusign Iris is the AI engine that powers Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) and Docusign's AI features across the agreement life cycle.

Note: These features are only available for envelopes sent from North American accounts.

Take advantage of these AI signing features when you’re signing documents.

- AI Summary that outlines the most important information in agreement and
  displays the key agreement details.
- Extraction that displays a summary of the key agreement details.
- Ask a question for customized agreement details and associated citations.

1. Open the document as described in [Docusign eSignature Signing Process](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=lou1573854977109.html&_LANG=enus "Learn about the Docusign eSignature signing process and eSignature signing terminology.") the
   article.
2. When the document opens, select the Ask a question
   prompt.

   ![A screenshot of the Signing AI Ask a question prompt.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/sign-new-ai-prompt.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzMsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.PRHhxzRIMzNL4n7CvaX7XYGqd-Zy-9fe9cGexxtwuC0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Signing AI Ask a question prompt.")

   A document summary displays.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Signing AI summary for a document.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/sign-first-ai-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzMsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.PRHhxzRIMzNL4n7CvaX7XYGqd-Zy-9fe9cGexxtwuC0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Signing AI summary for a document.")
3. You can clarify your document content by entering a question in the
   Ask a question about this document  field.

   This example shows a question and the resulting information with citations that you can
   review.

   ![A screenshot Docusign signing AI Ask a Question prompt.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/sign-new-ai-another-ex.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzMsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.PRHhxzRIMzNL4n7CvaX7XYGqd-Zy-9fe9cGexxtwuC0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot Docusign signing AI Ask a Question prompt.")
4. Optionally respond to the Was this helpful?  prompt by
   selecting an icon.

   - For positive feedback, in the Provide Additional
     feedback dialog box, enter your suggestions and select
     Submit.

     ![A screenshot of the Docusign Signing AI Ask a Question Provide Additional feedback dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signaiagreesumaddfeedbackdb.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzMsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.PRHhxzRIMzNL4n7CvaX7XYGqd-Zy-9fe9cGexxtwuC0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Docusign Signing AI Ask a Question Provide Additional feedback dialog box.")
   - For negative feedback, complete the feedback and select
     Submit.

     ![A screenshot of the Docusign Signing AI Ask a Question Help us improve dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/sign-new-feedback.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzMsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.PRHhxzRIMzNL4n7CvaX7XYGqd-Zy-9fe9cGexxtwuC0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Docusign Signing AI Ask a Question Help us improve dialog box.")

title: Decline To Sign an Envelope
text:
Learn how and when to decline to sign an envelope you review.

Here are some examples of when you might decline to sign an envelope:

- You received an envelope meant for another person.
- You’re signing an agreement, such as an apartment lease. Some of the terms you agreed to
  during your discussion with the leasing agent are missing or incorrect.
- The envelope containing the on-boarding package for your new job is missing key
  documents.

When you decline to sign, it prevents you and all other envelope recipients from signing.
Before declining to sign an envelope, ask the envelope's sender a question by posting a
comment to the envelope. For details about asking and answering questions, see the [Use Comments to
Ask and Answer Questions About a Document](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=ljq1573855001125.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to add information to or ask for clarification in the documents you are signing.") article. You can also reply to the email
notification you received.

Note the following:

- A sender can void an envelope as described in [Void an Envelope on Which You Are Also a Recipient﻿](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=oeq1643226594604&topicId=zyn1578456424164.html&_LANG=enus).
- A signer who is also the sender cannot Decline to Sign. Instead,
  they select Void Envelope.

To decline to sign:

1. Open the email notification and select REVIEW DOCUMENT.
2. In the upper right of the envelope, select OTHER ACTIONS and
   select Decline to Sign.

   ![A screenshot of the Decline to Sign option in the Signing Other Actions menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewdecline.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0NjMsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.f5dYqLo1GuPgTNwYDkNTBt0_sA2Gptqhex7w5d9saIw&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Decline to Sign option in the Signing Other Actions menu.")
3. Confirm that you understand that declining to sign voids the envelope not only for
   yourself, but also for all the other recipients of the envelope. Select
   CONTINUE.

   ![A screenshot of the Confirm Decline to Sign dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signdeclinecaution.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0NjMsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.f5dYqLo1GuPgTNwYDkNTBt0_sA2Gptqhex7w5d9saIw&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Confirm Decline to Sign dialog box.")
4. Provide a reason why you are declining to sign to the envelope sender. The envelope's
   sender may require you to provide a reason why you're declining. The text you enter is
   emailed to the sender and is recorded as part of the envelope history.

   ![A screenshot of the Decline to Sign Envelope Reason dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signdeclinereason.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0NjMsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.f5dYqLo1GuPgTNwYDkNTBt0_sA2Gptqhex7w5d9saIw&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Decline to Sign Envelope Reason dialog box.")
5. After providing a reason why you are declining, select DECLINE TO
   SIGN.

   A message displays confirming that you declined and that the Sender has been
   notified.

   ![A screenshot of the Decline to Sign confirmation message.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signdeclineconfirm.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0NjMsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.f5dYqLo1GuPgTNwYDkNTBt0_sA2Gptqhex7w5d9saIw&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Decline to Sign confirmation message.")

title: Sign a Document Received through Email
heading_path: Sign a Document Received through Email
text:
Learn how to sign a document you receive through email.

Learn how to sign a document you receive through
email.

1. Open the email.

   ![A screenshot of the Review and Act on These Documents prompt.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewersddb2.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNDcsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.OyfTEh9u3UX4gOIso7yYS4EdIKx8utddQOWgQFMRnYg&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Review and Act on These Documents prompt.")
2. If available, select the Electronic Record and Signature disclosure checkbox.
   Selecting this checkbox indicate you agree to the disclosure. The system starts
   the signing process.
3. If there is no Electronic Record and Signature disclosure, select the
   CONTINUE to start the signing process..
4. Add information to the required fields and select
   Sign.
5. If this is your first time signing a Docusign document, you are asked to adopt
   a signature as described in the [Adopt Your Signature](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=dga1573854990297.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to choose a style for your signature and initial when you first sign a document with Docusign.")
   topic.
6. Select Adopt and Sign to confirm your signature.
7. Select Finish to complete signing your document.

Note the following:

- If you select Finish without completing all required
  signing fields, the system displays the next required field that you must
  complete.

  ![A screenshot of the prompt identifying a required signing field.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewpromptifnotdone.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNDcsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.OyfTEh9u3UX4gOIso7yYS4EdIKx8utddQOWgQFMRnYg&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the prompt identifying a required signing field.")
- If you attempt to exit the browser, change the URL, or refresh the signing session page,
  the system prompts you to confirm that you want to abandon your signing
  session by selecting CANCEL or
  LEAVE.

8. After completing the signing, optionally set up a free Docusign account to more
   easily manage your signed documents.

After all parties have signed the document, you receive a
copy of the document.

title: How Do I Handle Supplemental Documents?
heading_path: How Do I Handle Supplemental Documents?
text:
Learn how to work with an envelope's supplemental documents.

The document sender can request that you perform certain actions for each supplement
included in the document.

If the sender of the document requests that you view, accept, or read and accept a
supplement, you must complete the request to finish signing the document.

If you have questions about the supplemental documents or what you should do, contact the
person sending you the document.

title: How Do I Handle Supplemental Documents?
heading_path: How Do I Handle Supplemental Documents?
text:
You are not required to take any action; the document is
available to review.

1. Select the thumbnail to view the supplement document.

   ![Screenshot of a supplement's thumbnail.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signinitialsupplement.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.-9rDHhjU2jvk4-pEJ-lk5FBx4BnICrleUumzFaXDzTo&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of a supplement's thumbnail.")
2. Alternatively, you can view the supplement after you complete the signing
   fields.

title: How Do I Handle Supplemental Documents?
heading_path: How Do I Handle Supplemental Documents?
View the Supplement To Finish Signing
text:
Some senders require you to view supplements before
completing the signing process.

1. Select VIEW to open the supplement.
2. Review the whole document by scrolling to the end to accept.
3. Select ACCEPT to complete the document signing.

title: How Do I Handle Supplemental Documents?
heading_path: How Do I Handle Supplemental Documents?
text:
To finish signing some documents, you must review and accept
the supplements.

1. After displaying a supplement, review the terms and conditions and select
   ACCEPT.
2. If the message `Read the entire supplement in order to accept`
   displays at the bottom of your browser window, you must scroll to the bottom before you
   can select ACCEPT.

   ![Screenshot of accepting an entire supplement.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signsupplementviewallaccept.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.-9rDHhjU2jvk4-pEJ-lk5FBx4BnICrleUumzFaXDzTo&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of accepting an entire supplement.")

title: How Do I Handle Supplemental Documents?
heading_path: How Do I Handle Supplemental Documents?
Save a Copy of a Supplement
text:
When you download or print a document, supplements may be
included. Because supplements can be lengthy, sometimes supplements may not be included when
you download the signed document.

1. To save a copy of a supplement, see the [Save or Print Document Supplements](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=cfh1573855008547.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to save or print a supplement to a document you're signing.")
   article.
2. If supplements are not included in the document download, you can download a copy or
   print from the supplement view. The easiest way to access a document is from the email
   notification as described in the [Download or Print a Supplement From an Email Notification](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=abb1578679305324.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to download or print a document from the eSignature supplement view.") article.

   For instructions on how to download or print a document, see the [How do I download or print a document I receive?](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=sto1596228661240&topicId=wdr1573855014901.html&_LANG=enus) article.

title: Add Information to Documents
text:
Learn how to complete the required fields, optional fields, and comments to add
information to the documents you are signing.

Use these resources to add information to
documents when signing a document.
.

Control
Toolbar

In the toolbar on the right, there are controls for:

- Displaying the thumbnail view of document pages in the display
- Posting a comment or question about the document
- Generating a PDF of all the documents in the envelope to download them
- Generating a PDF to print the document
- Selecting the zoom options

![A screenshot of the document control options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewannotatedotheracticons.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzcsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.K4cMN4xDgUMQgla-fSjonKJqlDGcGHzkso8ChfJSs6o&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the document control options.")

The bottom of the right side displays the zoom controls.

![A screenshot of the document zoom controls.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewzoomicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzcsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.K4cMN4xDgUMQgla-fSjonKJqlDGcGHzkso8ChfJSs6o&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the document zoom controls.")

Freeform fields

If the page displays a list of fields
on the left side of the page, the sender has sent you documents where you must place and
complete the fields. This is called freeform signing. For information on free-form signing,
see the [Use Freeform Signing](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=anf1573854985078.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to use Docusign Freeform signing using the menu on the left side of the signing page.")
article.

![A screenshot of the available free form fields to add to a document.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewfreeformfields.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzcsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.K4cMN4xDgUMQgla-fSjonKJqlDGcGHzkso8ChfJSs6o&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the available free form fields to add to a document.")

Signing indicators

Selecting or tapping the yellow
START action indicator takes you to the first field that requires
your input.

![A screenshot of the signing START action indicator.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewstart.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzcsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.K4cMN4xDgUMQgla-fSjonKJqlDGcGHzkso8ChfJSs6o&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the signing START action indicator.")

The
NEXT action indicator moves through the document, showing where you
must provide information. You can place your cursor over a field to see any tips the sender
has provided.

![A screenshot of the signing NEXT action indicator.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewnextreq.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzcsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.K4cMN4xDgUMQgla-fSjonKJqlDGcGHzkso8ChfJSs6o&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the signing NEXT action indicator.")

Senders
can set the order where fields are presented. Therefore, there might be times when the
action indicator jumps to a different part of the page. You can still scroll through the
pages to read them, but the system does not let you finish signing until you complete all
the required fields.

title: Add Information to Documents
text:
action indicator jumps to a different part of the page. You can still scroll through the
pages to read them, but the system does not let you finish signing until you complete all
the required fields.

Note: if you want
to finish signing later, select the OTHER ACTIONS menu. You can also
use the Print & Sign option, or decline to sign. The available
options depend on sender settings. See the [Other Signing Actions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=qdy1573854987499.html&_LANG=enus "Learn about the available options for signers from the Other Actions menu.") article for
more information about these options.

Fields that are outlined in red are required.
Add entries to these fields to complete the signing process.

Note: Some fields, such as signing date fields,
are automatically completed based on information available to the system. You cannot change
this information.

Select options

- To select an option or check box, select or tap on the appropriate option or check box.
  Note that you can only select one option in a group.
- To select an option from a dropdown list, select the list and select the appropriate
  option.
- To add other information in a boxed field, type the requested information into the field
  and select NEXT or press Tab to
  continue.
- To sign or initial, select the SIGN or
  INITIAL field on the document.

  The first time you select a
  SIGN or INITIAL field, you are prompted
  to adopt your signature and initials. See the [Adopt Your Signature](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=dga1573854990297.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to choose a style for your signature and initial when you first sign a document with Docusign.") article for additional information.
- If there is an attachment field (a yellow field with a paperclip icon) on a document,
  the sender has requested that you provide supporting documentation.

  To do so, upload
  supporting documents during the signing process or fax it.
- When you reach an attachment field, you are prompted to select the attachment field to
  add the supporting document. See the [Add Attachments to a Document to Provide Supporting Information](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=nbl1573854991156.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to return requested documents to the sender as an attachment.") article for
  information about submitting the documents.

Complete your information

After you have added
information to all the required fields and any signatures and initials the
FINISH prompt displays:

![A screenshot of the Ready to Finish prompt.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewreadyfinish.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzcsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.K4cMN4xDgUMQgla-fSjonKJqlDGcGHzkso8ChfJSs6o&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Ready to Finish prompt.")

Complete the signing as described in the [Complete the Signing Session](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=abm1573854992359.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to complete signing and optionally save or print a copy of your signed documents.")
article.

Alternatively, you can select another signing option from the menu.

![A screenshot of the Other Options menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewotheroptionsdb.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNzcsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.K4cMN4xDgUMQgla-fSjonKJqlDGcGHzkso8ChfJSs6o&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Other Options menu.")

title: Digital Signatures for Enhanced Agreement Security
heading_path: Digital Signatures for Enhanced Agreement Security
text:
Read about how Docusign Digital Signatures meet industry and country
standards for security.

As more business transactions move online, secure signing is more important than ever. An
electronic signature is a secure, binding electronic symbol that’s attached to a
document when you sign it. A Docusign eSignature is typically a
standard electronic signature.

For most use cases, customers, and places, a standard electronic signature is
sufficient. However, transactions in heavily regulated industries, in certain countries
or with governmental entities may require or prefer digital signatures. Digital
signatures offer a heightened level of identity assurance for electronic signatures.

title: Digital Signatures for Enhanced Agreement Security
heading_path: Digital Signatures for Enhanced Agreement Security
text:
A digital signature is an electronic signature using cryptographic techniques such as digital
certificates to serve the following purposes:

- Authentication: Confirm the identity of the signer. A signer’s
  digital certificate creates the signature and ensures that signed documents have
  not been tampered with.
- Integrity: Provide assurance that the content of the document has not
  been altered.
- Non-repudiation: Prevent the signer from denying their involvement or
  the validity of the signature.

title: Digital Signatures for Enhanced Agreement Security
heading_path: Digital Signatures for Enhanced Agreement Security
text:
There are international standards that specify requirements for digital signatures, such as
the methods used to authenticate a signer. Docusign digital certificate-based
signatures (digital signatures) support your efforts to comply with these
specifications. Such specifications include the European Union’s (EU) Electronic
Identification, Authentication and Trust Services regulation (eIDAS). This
regulation defines two types of certificate-based signatures called Advanced and
Qualified electronic signatures (or AES and QES). Both signatures require identity
authentication to issue a digital certificate.

title: Fax Your Documents
text:
Learn how to select Fax the Docusign signing Other Actions
menu.

To fax your documents as the return method, follow these instructions.

Note:

- If you already downloaded the documents but quit during a previous Print &
  Sign session before returning your documents, you must download the documents
  again and sign using these instructions.
- If you see Print & Sign: Download Document, the
  document's sender doesn't support return by FAX. Follow the instructions in the
  [Upload Signed Documents](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=ctc1573855014359.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to upload documents you must print, sign, and return.") article.

1. Select Fax and select CONTINUE.

   ![A screenshot of the Print & Sign dialog box with download for fax selected.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/newsigningprintfax.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0NTksInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.j4zY0D2tniP-rzTvtCGxc3VvtcU5TR7NqUuJXcwgaZw&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Print & Sign dialog box with download for fax selected.")
2. Select DOWNLOAD to download the fax cover page and your
   documents.
3. After downloading the fax cover page and your documents, select
   FINISH to exit the signing process.
4. Print the fax cover page and documents using your normal printing method.
5. Complete and sign the printed pages as needed.
6. Follow the instructions on the printed fax cover page to fax the documents to
   Docusign.

   Note: When faxing your documents, make sure to send the
   Docusign fax cover page first. The fax cover page has
   information that links your documents to the envelope. Your documents might
   be lost if the cover sheet is not the first page.
7. When Docusign receives the fax, your documents are matched with the sender’s
   original request to complete the process.

   Note: You can
   optionally upload the documents or sign them electronically. If you sign
   electronically, you can return to the document using the link in the
   original email that was sent to you. After you open the document, select
   CANCEL FAX to cancel the fax process. Then follow
   the instructions for uploading your documents.

You have successfully completed signing your documents.

When all the signers have completed signing, you receive an email confirming this and
giving you have the option to download a PDF copy of the completed documents.

title: View Comments and Replies Through the Notification Center
heading_path: View Comments and Replies Through the Notification Center
text:
Learn how to use the Docusign Notification Center to view comments or
replies.

The Notification Center contains notices about pending tasks that
you complete, as well as message replies.

1. Log on to your Docusign account.

   If you have messages, the notification icon ![Docusign account notification icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnotifyicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MTAsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.o0En8laSBkOKrXZ6s2bIkoENVeAFQmGwO3UQEtnNGhs&_LANG=enus "Docusign account notification icon."), it has a red indicator that you have notification messages.
2. Select the ![Docusign account notification icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnotifyicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MTAsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.o0En8laSBkOKrXZ6s2bIkoENVeAFQmGwO3UQEtnNGhs&_LANG=enus "Docusign account notification icon.") to view the Notifications menu.

   ![A screenshot Actions Required in the Notification Menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewactionsreq.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MTAsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.o0En8laSBkOKrXZ6s2bIkoENVeAFQmGwO3UQEtnNGhs&_LANG=enus "A screenshot Actions Required in the Notification Menu.")
3. Select Actions required to display your notifications.
4. In the Notification Center, select the checkbox next to the comment or reply you want
   to view.

   ![Screenshot of sample notifications for required actions.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signactionreq.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MTAsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.o0En8laSBkOKrXZ6s2bIkoENVeAFQmGwO3UQEtnNGhs&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of sample notifications for required actions.")

   Note: You can sort comments by selecting Filters,
   and entering search criteria.

   ![A screenshot of message filters with APPLY or RESET options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signinboxfilters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MTAsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.o0En8laSBkOKrXZ6s2bIkoENVeAFQmGwO3UQEtnNGhs&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of message filters with APPLY or RESET options.")
5. Selecting a comment in the notifications list opens the document and takes you to the
   comment or reply.

   ![A screenshot of a posted comment.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewcommfinalresponse.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MTAsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.o0En8laSBkOKrXZ6s2bIkoENVeAFQmGwO3UQEtnNGhs&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a posted comment.")

   View comments and replies through email

   To view comments and replies in an envelope, select the REVIEW
   DOCUMENTS link in the email notification indicating a comment or reply was
   made.

   - Select the REVIEW DOCUMENTS link in a comment or reply
     notification. The envelope opens and displays the comment or reply.
   - Select the REVIEW DOCUMENTS link in the original email
     notification asking for your signature. The envelope opens and you can scroll to view
     comments.

title: Use Comments To Ask and Answer Questions About a Document
heading_path: Use Comments To Ask and Answer Questions About a Document
text: Learn how to add information to or ask for clarification in the documents you are signing.

title: Use Comments To Ask and Answer Questions About a Document
heading_path: Use Comments To Ask and Answer Questions About a Document
text:
When you're signing a document and you have questions about it, or disagree with something in it, you can post a comment in the document. You can type in a question and control that of the other recipients sees it.

For more information, see the [Settings to Allow Comments on Documents and Envelope](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pik1583277475390&topicId=odr1583277453624.html&_LANG=enus) article.

1. Open the document about which you have a question or comment.
2. In the document, select the comment icon ![The esignature Add Comment icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewaddcomm.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.nl-Pa3U3U4AL2HgBry_4N3jUDvZD1jJbuVZVrH7OuxY&_LANG=enus "The esignature Add Comment icon").
3. Click in the document where you want to place the comment.

   ![A screenshot of a comment indicator.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewcommindicator.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.nl-Pa3U3U4AL2HgBry_4N3jUDvZD1jJbuVZVrH7OuxY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a comment indicator.")
4. In the text box on the right, type your question or comment.

   ![A screenshot of entering a comment.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewcommquestion.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.nl-Pa3U3U4AL2HgBry_4N3jUDvZD1jJbuVZVrH7OuxY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of entering a comment.")
5. Select who can see the comment. In this example, only one user can view the comment.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Select Who Can See this pop-up prom](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewcommsee.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.nl-Pa3U3U4AL2HgBry_4N3jUDvZD1jJbuVZVrH7OuxY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Select Who Can See this pop-up prom")

   You can only notify recipients who:

   - Have their preferences set so they receive notifications
   - Are either currently signing the envelope or have already signed

   Important: You cannot edit or delete a comment after you've posted it. Before posting your comment, carefully enter your text and select the person to view the comment.
6. Select POST.

   After you select POST in the disclaimer, your comment is posted. If you select CANCEL, your comment is not posted.

   After you post a comment, it looks like the following example:

   ![A screenshot of completed comment posting](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewcommfinal.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.nl-Pa3U3U4AL2HgBry_4N3jUDvZD1jJbuVZVrH7OuxY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of completed comment posting")

Depending on how your notification preferences are set, you receive an email notification when someone replies to your comment. If you do not have an account with Docusign, you receive an email notification each time a comment or reply is made that is visible to you.

title: Use Comments To Ask and Answer Questions About a Document
heading_path: Use Comments To Ask and Answer Questions About a Document
Reply to a Comment or Another Reply
text:
1. In the envelope, find and select the comment you want to reply to:

   ![A screenshot of entering a comment.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewcommquestion.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.nl-Pa3U3U4AL2HgBry_4N3jUDvZD1jJbuVZVrH7OuxY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of entering a comment.")

   Enter your reply.

   ![A screenshot of entering your response to a comment.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewcommreply.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.nl-Pa3U3U4AL2HgBry_4N3jUDvZD1jJbuVZVrH7OuxY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of entering your response to a comment.")
2. Select Reply.

![A screenshot of a completed posted comment.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewcommfinalresponse.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDQsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.nl-Pa3U3U4AL2HgBry_4N3jUDvZD1jJbuVZVrH7OuxY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a completed posted comment.")

title: Docusign eSignature Signing Process
text:
Learn about the Docusign eSignature signing process and eSignature signing terminology.

Here is an overview of the basic Docusign signing process with links to more detailed topics.

For signing device requirements, see the [System Requirements for Signing](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=thx1573854978578.html&_LANG=enus "Review these minimum signing system requirements. These include signing online, signing with mobile devices, signing with assistive technologies, and Docusign Notary signing.") article. Docusign signing is also compatible with assistive technology, as
described in the [Docusign Accessibility Hub](https://www.docusign.com/accessibility?postSignIn=true) article.

title: Docusign eSignature Signing Process
text:
The signing process begins when you receive an email notification from Docusign informing you that you have a document to sign. The document is contained in a Docusign envelope. Docusign sends the email notification on behalf of the Sender. The notification contains a message from the Sender and a link to open the documents. Alternately, you can access the documents by going to the Docusign website and entering the document security code from the email.

Note: If the email message has a small shield and the text Part 11 Module Enabled, there are special requirements for signing these documents. See the [Sign Part 11 Module Enabled Documents](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=yzu1573855023673.html&_LANG=enus "Read about special requirements, including U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) regulations, for signing Part 11 Module-enabled documents.") article for more information.

To begin signing, select CONTINUE.

Note: The sender may optionally include an Electronic Record and Signature disclosure. Selecting this option indicates that you agree to the disclosure.

![A screenshot of prompt to continue and begin the signing process.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewersddb2.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNDEsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.vhXuFFJ_NeF0h5SEbvlIxZWpPK1bf3nY_NkNNU9kZEA&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of prompt to continue and begin the signing process.")

The system starts the signing process.

Note: Review the document by scrolling or by using the page thumbnails in the right-side navigation before signing.

View this brief video that describes the signing process.

 

For detailed signing information, see the  [Docusign Signing FAQ](https://support.docusign.com/s/articles/DocuSign-Signing-FAQs) article.

title: Docusign eSignature Signing Process
text:
Email notification
:   The means by which signers are informed that they have an electronic document to sign. The email notification includes a link that takes the signer directly to the document..

Envelope
:   The container that holds one or more documents. The envelope also holds the recipient information and the fields placed on the document.

Sender
:   Persons who can create, send, and manage Docusign envelopes.

Signer
:   An envelope recipient who must act on an envelope or documents within an envelope.

Fields
:   Indicate where a Signer must act on the document. For example, completing data, selecting, or applying a signature.

title: Docusign eSignature Signing Process
text:
Senders can ask you to verify your identity before signing. This option is set by the person or business that is sending the documents.

Identity authentication methods include:

Phone
:   You answer a phone call and receive a verbal authentication code. You enter the code to view your documents.

SMS
:   You receive an SMS text message at a specified phone number. The text message contains an access code that you must enter to view your documents.

Knowledge-based ID check
:   You answer detailed questions about yourself. The questions are based on data available in public records (such as current and former addresses).

Follow the on-screen instructions to complete this step. The following example shows authentication through an access code received by SMS.

![Screenshot of verifying signing through an SMS message.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/verifysms.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNDEsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.vhXuFFJ_NeF0h5SEbvlIxZWpPK1bf3nY_NkNNU9kZEA&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of verifying signing through an SMS message.")

For detailed information, see the [Recipient Identity Verification](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=gav1643676262430&topicId=kzp1578456318101.html&_LANG=enus) article.

title: Docusign eSignature Signing Process
text:
This guide is part of a collection of user guides
for Docusign eSignature. The following table provides information about some of the other
user documentation available.

| Title | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [eSignature Basics for Senders](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=ulp1643236876813&topicId=ezn1578456259592.html&_LANG=enus) | Introductory information for new users. Covers how to get started with Docusign eSignature and learn the basics. |
| [Account Preferences and Profile Settings for Docusign eSignature](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=jux1643235969954&topicId=kde1578456454912.html&_LANG=enus) | Information on how to manage your account preferences, including contacts list, notification preferences, managing delegated signers, and more. |
| [Docusign eSignature for Senders - Recipients](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=gav1643676262430&topicId=lxv1687564231272.html&_LANG=enus) | Information on adding recipients to your envelopes. Includes advanced recipient techniques, such as setting a signing order, assigning access permissions, and adding optional recipients. |
| [eSignature for Senders - Agreements](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=gbo1643332197980&topicId=nto1703722552572.html&_LANG=enus) | Expanded information on preparing documents for signature. Includes details on the different types of recipient and sender fields you can add. |
| [Document Templates for Docusign Agreement Preparation](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=map332c3ebc-8fca-4fac-9b9f-c7206adc3985&topicId=conc8f06624-6ef6-40a3-bbc8-c5c7fe18746b.html) | Information on creating reusable documents to use in multiple envelope templates. |
| [Document Generation for eSignature](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=als1679428547895&topicId=con69f37310-893b-4c6e-b9f9-41695d325749.html&_LANG=enus) | Information on using document generation to automatically generate customized documents. |
| [Docusign eSignature - Templates](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=xry1643227563338&topicId=dqj1578456412286.html&_LANG=enus) | Information on creating, using, and managing templates. |
| [Docusign eSignature - PowerForms](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=jbx1643062255110&topicId=eke1578456649038.html&_LANG=enus) | Information on creating, using, and managing PowerForms. PowerForms is a no-code solution for a signer to generate an agreement on demand. |
| [Web Forms](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=gmi1660583110357&topicId=brp1660583998599.html&_LANG=enus) | Information on creating, using, and managing web forms. |
| [Payments User Guide](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=juu1573854950452&topicId=khu1573854896470.html&_LANG=enus) | Information on setting up and using Docusign Payments to collect payments along with signed agreements. |
| [Managing Envelopes for Senders](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=oeq1643226594604&topicId=ghu1578456429097.html&_LANG=enus) | Information on managing your Docusign eSignature envelopes. |
| [Docusign eSignature Reports](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=cnu1642812012214&topicId=wou1578456440763.html&_LANG=enus) | Information for senders and administrators on how to use reports to get insights into their Docusign account. |
| [Docusign eSignature Signing Process](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=lou1573854977109.html&_LANG=enus) | Information for signers on how to sign documents with Docusign eSignature. |

title: Sign Documents With Signer-Held Digital Certificates
heading_path: Sign Documents With Signer-Held Digital Certificates
text:
Learn about signing documents using signer-held digital certificates.

Docusign supports signing documents using signer-held digital
certificates. Unlike cloud certificates, signer-held certificates reside on a computer,
a smart card, or a USB drive.

title: Sign Documents With Signer-Held Digital Certificates
heading_path: Sign Documents With Signer-Held Digital Certificates
text:
- Use a desktop or laptop computer when you sign with a signer-held certificate.
- Ensure that you can access your signer-held certificate from your computer. Install the
  corresponding card reader if you use a smart card to store your certificate. Signers
  using a USB token must install the relevant drivers. If you stored your certificate
  on your computer, make sure to install it properly in your computer's certificate
  store.
- Ensure that the computer you are using has an operating system that remains under
  active support by the OS vendor. Environments that have reached the end of support or
  end of life are not eligible for Docusign support or guaranteed compatibility.
- Use one of the following supported browsers: Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, or
  Microsoft Edge.

  Note: eSignature no longer supports signer-held
  certificates on Safari.
- Check that your certificate follows this criteria If you want to generate qualified
  electronic signatures (QES) compliant with the European eIDas regulation:
  - The certificate authority (CA) that issued your digital certificate is part of
    the EU trust list
  - A Qualified Electronic Signature Device (QSCD) has issued your digital
    certificate

See the [Accepted Trust Service Providers](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=xww1594245808169&topicId=def1594657272301.html&_LANG=enus) topic for a list of all
CAs (also called Trust Service Providers) that partner with eSignature to provide
digital signatures.

title: Use Document Mark Up To Negotiate Changes
heading_path: Use Document Mark Up To Negotiate Changes
text:
Use the document mark up feature to suggest changes to your document by adding
suggested changes within the document.

If the sender has enabled the document mark up feature for the envelope, you can use this
feature to negotiate changes to documents during the Docusign signing
workflow.

Note: Mobile devices do not support document mark
up.

1. When Document mark up is enabled, select OTHER ACTIONS > Mark Up .

   ![A screenshot of the Markup option in the Docusign Sign menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/markup-selection.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDIsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.yL1fTqBUPMif9McVW6YZaLF6-Pu2_GJIZ-mrGFcQCII&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Markup option in the Docusign Sign menu.")

   The Markup instructions display.

   ![A screenshot of the Markup instructions when signing a document.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewmarkinstructions.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDIsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.yL1fTqBUPMif9McVW6YZaLF6-Pu2_GJIZ-mrGFcQCII&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Markup instructions when signing a document.")
2. Select CONTINUE.
3. A special mark up field displays. You can drag and place the mark up field anywhere on
   the document.

   ![A screenshot of the document mark up field.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/markuptag.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDIsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.yL1fTqBUPMif9McVW6YZaLF6-Pu2_GJIZ-mrGFcQCII&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the document mark up field.")
4. (Optional) Enter information into the mark up field.

   ![A screenshot of a sample document mark up field you can edit.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/markuptextentry.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDIsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.yL1fTqBUPMif9McVW6YZaLF6-Pu2_GJIZ-mrGFcQCII&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample document mark up field you can edit.")

   An Initial tag displays at the margin to the right of the field that you must sign to
   complete the mark up action.

   ![A screenshot of a sample document mark up add initials tag.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/markuptext-entry.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDIsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.yL1fTqBUPMif9McVW6YZaLF6-Pu2_GJIZ-mrGFcQCII&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample document mark up add initials tag.")
5. If other recipients have already signed the document, they receive an email
   notification to review the suggested changes. When they view the document, they are
   prompted to reply.

   ![A screenshot of a reply to a mark up request in a signed document.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewmarkupreply.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDIsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.yL1fTqBUPMif9McVW6YZaLF6-Pu2_GJIZ-mrGFcQCII&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a reply to a mark up request in a signed document.")

   Recipients can accept the change by initialing it, or edit the change and initial their
   version. The review process continues until all recipients have initialed all changes.

title: Use Document Mark Up To Negotiate Changes
heading_path: Use Document Mark Up To Negotiate Changes
text:
signed document.")

   Recipients can accept the change by initialing it, or edit the change and initial their
   version. The review process continues until all recipients have initialed all changes.

   ![A screenshot of a prompt to initial document mark up suggested changes.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/markupreviewinitial.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDIsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.yL1fTqBUPMif9McVW6YZaLF6-Pu2_GJIZ-mrGFcQCII&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a prompt to initial document mark up suggested changes.")
6. Once all changes are initialed, the document is complete and a completed email
   notification is sent to all recipients. The notification includes details of the mark up
   changes.
7. The final document includes all completed fields, including the mark up changes and
   corresponding initials.

   ![A screenshot of final document listing mark up changes and initials.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/markupdinal.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQ0MDIsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.yL1fTqBUPMif9McVW6YZaLF6-Pu2_GJIZ-mrGFcQCII&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of final document listing mark up changes and initials.")

title: Verify Your Identity
text:
Learn about using the different authentication methods to verify your identity for
Docusign eSignature.

When signing a document, senders might request information to verify who you are.

Senders ask you to verify your identity through:

- Access code
- SMS Authentication
- Phone authentication
- Knowledge-based authentication
- ID Verification
- Account Logon: Only for Part 11 Module Enabled documents

Note: If you change signing responsibility as described in
the [Change Signing Responsibility](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=uin1573855010064.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to assign a document to another person if you're not the right person to sign the document.") article, SMS and phone authentication are not
supported for the new signer.

title: Verify Your Identity
text:
The person sending the envelope sends you an access code. Enter the access code
before viewing the documents. This option can be combined with other authentication
options.

1. Enter the code and select Validate to complete the
   security request. You have three attempts to enter the code correctly. After
   entering the access code, you are taken through the normal signing process.
2. Select I never received an access code if you do not
   know the access code . Doing so notifies the sender to request the code.

title: Verify Your Identity
text:
You receive a security request page and must select a phone number for text
authentication. Select Send SMS to continue or select
Cancel to postpone the text message and return later.

1. Select Send SMS to send an SMS text message with a
   passcode to the selected phone number.
2. Enter the passcode and select Confirm Code to complete
   the security request. After the passcode is confirmed, you are taken through the
   normal signing process.

title: Verify Your Identity
text:
You receive a security request page and must answer a phone call at a number you
provide to receive an authentication code that you enter on page. Once you
successfully pass the authentication challenge, you can access and sign your
documents as usual.

1. Select Send Code.
2. The Voice Authentication dialog box updates to show the call is in process and
   provides a place for you to enter the verification code.
3. Once the call connects, you hear the authentication code. Enter the code in the
   Voice Authentication dialog box and click Confirm Code.
4. When the authentication is successful, you continue with the normal signing
   process.

title: Verify Your Identity
text:
You are prompted to enter some personal information and then you are presented with
questions about yourself based on data available in public records.

1. After entering the information, select Next to
   continue.
2. You are presented with a set of questions based on publicly available information. Answer the
   questions to complete the ID verification. After the ID verification is
   successfully completed, you are taken through the normal signing process.

title: Verify Your Identity
text:
Select a country and choose one of the available options for the ID to use to verify
your identity.

Most countries accept a passport or photo ID, but also may allow other options, such
as Bank ID, eID, or smartcards.

1. Select Next at the Let's Verify your
   Identity prompt.
2. Select the country.
3. Select an available ID option.
4. Follow the prompts for the ID you selected to complete the authorization.
5. When the verification is complete, you are taken through the normal signing
   process.

If the list of supported countries does not include your country, follow these steps:

1. At the Let's Verify your Identity prompt, select any
   country from the list.
2. Select an available ID option.
3. Follow the prompts for the ID you selected to complete the authorization.
4. The ID verification fails, and you receive a notification that the sender must
   manually review the ID you submitted.

   The sender sends you a notification when
   the ID is approved.
5. Upon ID approval, you can resume and complete the signing.

title: Verify Your Identity
heading_path: Account logon-based authentication for Part 11 Module Enabled documents
text:
If you receive an email that has the notation Part 11 Module Enabled, there are some
special requirements. You might need to authenticate a few times. How and where you
authenticate depend on what the sender required.

For added security, senders might require account logon authentication for Part 11
Module Enabled documents.

![Screenshot of Part 11 Module enabled document notation.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signpart11.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzNjgsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.tlPP0aynA9HkLzdc2W4KsfeCd6lhefoVWpjuBSVDGH0&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of Part 11 Module enabled document notation.")

You may need to authenticate through:

- Account logon: You enter the username and password for your Docusign account to
  access and sign the documents. If you don’t have an account, you must first
  create an account and then enter your username and password.
- Account logon and another method: You authenticate through Account logon and one
  of the other identity verification methods (Access Code, SMS Authentication,
  Phone Authentication or ID Check).

With Account logon, you have a limited number of chances to correctly enter
your password. If you don’t enter the correct password, you are locked out of
Docusign and can’t finish signing.

For detailed information, see the [Sign Part 11 Module Enabled Documents](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=yzu1573855023673.html&_LANG=enus "Read about special requirements, including U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) regulations, for signing Part 11 Module-enabled documents.")
article.

title: View Comments and Replies
text:
Learn how to access documents that include comments or replies when you sign.

When you're signing or sending an envelope and have questions or comments about a document, you can use the Docusign comments feature. For example, you may not agree with the language of a contract, or you may recommend that another person signs the document.

To view comments or replies to comments:

- If you receive an email notification, select the link in the notification.
- If you have a Docusign account, log on to your account and open the document in the Notification Center as described in the [View Comments and Replies Through the Notification Center](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=jxh1573855003469.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to use the Docusign Notification Center to view comments or replies.") article.

If you're not receiving email notifications about comments or replies, it can be that notifications are sorted into your spam folder or the sender of the envelope has disabled email notifications. Look in your spam folder or ask the sender of the envelope about it.

For more information, see the [Settings to Allow Comments on Documents and Envelope](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=odr1583277453624.html&_LANG=enus) article.

title: Change Your Signature
text:
Learn how to change your signature and initials for a document you are signing.

When signing a document, you may need to change your signature. For a quick overview of
this process, see the video in [How do I change my signature or adopt a custom signature?](https://support.docusign.com/s/articles/How-do-I-change-my-signature-or-adopt-a-custom-signature-NDSE).

Common scenarios include:

- Fix a misspelled name
- Your name has changed since you last signed
- You want to resize the signature or initial tab to fit the document you are signing
- Users with a shared email address receive an envelope addressed to both of the users.
  They must change the signature to ensure that the correct user is signing

Note: These restrictions apply to changing signatures:

- You must have a Docusign account to implement multiple
  signatures.
- You can only have one signature per full name.
- When you adopt a new signature, this action deletes and replaces the previous
  signature.
- If you are the only signer, you cannot select a saved signature.
- If you are a first-time signer, you cannot modify your signature after you initially
  adopt your signature (as described in the [Adopt your
  signature](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=dga1573854990297.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to choose a style for your signature and initial when you first sign a document with Docusign.") article).

Certain other restrictions can prohibit changing your signature. For complete details, see
the [Why can't I change my signature?](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=tpz1620246007465.html&_LANG=enus "Read about situations where you can't change your signature.") article.

1. Browse to the document through the Docusign notification email.
2. Select CONTINUE to accept the Electronic Record and
   Signature Disclosure and display the document.
3. Select START to go to the first signature field.
4. Select the signature field marked Required - Sign Here to
   display the Adopt your Signature  dialog box.

   ![Screenshot of Adopt Your Signature dialog box with ADOPT AND SIGN option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewadoptsigdb.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzODcsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.HR58kNJUDkkDzQlmL6oKvWLpksn0Q_U5JLQmTicMRP4&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of Adopt Your Signature dialog box with ADOPT AND SIGN option.")
5. Select one of these options to change your signature.
   - SELECT STYLE > Change Style to change the signature and initials appearance.
   - DRAW to draw your signature.
   - USE A SIGNATURE PAD > Start Capture to create your signature on a signature pad.
   - UPLOAD a signature image file.
6. Select ADOPT AND SIGN.
7. Select FINISH.

title: Change Your Signature
heading_path: Change your Signature in Your Account
text:
You can change an existing signature and initials from your
Docusign Account at any time.

1. From your Docusign account, select your account icon and select
   Manage Profile.
2. Select Signatures and choose:
   - Edit to display all available signatures.
   - Delete to remove an existing signature.
   - + Add New to create a new signature.
3. Confirm that your full name and initials are correct, and select a style, draw, or
   upload your signature. When finished, select CREATE.

title: Add Drawings to Documents You Sign
heading_path: Add Drawings to Documents You Sign
text:
Learn how to use the Drawing field to add free-form drawings to specific areas within
the document.

Add
free-form drawings to specific areas within the
document
with the Drawing field. The sender defines these areas and can
include an option for you to add your own image.

Here are some examples for using the Drawing field:

Accident report
:   Draw on the accident information diagram. Optionally upload an image of your
    car and draw on it to indicate the damaged areas.

House survey plan
:   Draw on the survey plan to indicate fence installation.

Medical record form
:   Draw on an image of the human body to indicate injury or pain points.

To draw on images in a document:

1. Open the document as described in the [Docusign eSignature Signing Process](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=lou1573854977109.html&_LANG=enus "Learn about the Docusign eSignature signing process and eSignature signing terminology.")
   article.
2. Locate the Drawing field.

   ![Screenshot of the FILL IN prompt in a drawing field.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signerfirstdraw.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzOTksInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.22ctq4nxPHfUU1yg0InwR6r76n9vk0vYhcKq6SfI0UY&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of the FILL IN prompt in a drawing field.")
3. Click anywhere in the Drawing field to activate the drawing area and display
   the Draw menu.

   ![Screenshot of the Drawing field menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signerdrawmenu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzOTksInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.22ctq4nxPHfUU1yg0InwR6r76n9vk0vYhcKq6SfI0UY&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of the Drawing field menu.")

   Use a simple online pen tool to draw lines and shapes in six basic colors anywhere within
   the dimensions of the field.

   Using the Draw menu, you can:

   - Select a color
   - Draw with different thicknesses
   - Clear everything you've drawn with CLEAR ALL
   - Save your changes and drawing before you finish signing
   - Resize
     uploaded
     images
4. Add your drawings to the Drawing field as shown in this auto insurance accident
   report example.

   ![Screenshot of a completed Drawing field.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signerdrawfield.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzOTksInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.22ctq4nxPHfUU1yg0InwR6r76n9vk0vYhcKq6SfI0UY&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of a completed Drawing field.")
5. If the sender included the option to upload an image in an additional Drawing
   field:

   1. Click anywhere in the Drawing field and select
      Upload.
   2. Use the slider to adjust the file size if required, and
      select
      Crop.
      ![Screenshot of upload a resizing image for a drawing you are adding.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signerdrawslider.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzOTksInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.22ctq4nxPHfUU1yg0InwR6r76n9vk0vYhcKq6SfI0UY&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of upload a resizing image for a drawing you are adding.")

   The following examples show a completed auto accident report.

title: Add Drawings to Documents You Sign
heading_path: Add Drawings to Documents You Sign
text:
Mzg5MiJ9.22ctq4nxPHfUU1yg0InwR6r76n9vk0vYhcKq6SfI0UY&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of upload a resizing image for a drawing you are adding.")

   The following examples show a completed auto accident report.

   ![Screenshot of a document's completed drawing fields.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signerdrawcompleteupload.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjQzOTksInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.22ctq4nxPHfUU1yg0InwR6r76n9vk0vYhcKq6SfI0UY&_LANG=enus "Screenshot of a document's completed drawing fields.")
6.
